prose: The frontier-orbitals calculation on furan using DFT with the B3LYP functional, def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard'), in the gas phase, charge 0, and multiplicity 1 was successful. The results indicate the HOMO at -6.36 eV and LUMO at -0.10 eV, with a HOMO-LUMO gap of approximately 6.257 eV. The method used is: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier 'standard' in PySCF, gas phase.
